1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God

1.dv: from H4871 (מָשָׁה); drawing out (of the water), i.e. rescued;

2.dv: from H4711 (מָצַץ) in the sense of greedily devouring for sweetness;

2.gl: properly, strength; hence, anything strong; specifically a chief (politically); also a ram (from his strength); a pilaster (as a strong support); an oak or other strong tree
2.kj: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.

2.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
2.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).
